finding: TLS niche is under-resolved at standard tissue-architecture granularity (k=7-8): best-overlap domain ~11% of tissue vs true 3.9% niche; best-domain F1 only rises to niche-matched precision at k~30-40 (domain size finally ~= 99 foci spots).
spatial_weighting_effect: Spatial smoothing (sw=0.3) SUPPRESSES the fine immune niche at typical k (F1 0.11-0.14 at k<=15), only recovering at very high k -- i.e. spatial-domain smoothing merges small immune niches into large tissue blocks.
